CommandText:
SELECT c."Id", c."Address", c."BusinessType", c."CreatedBy", c."CreatedDate", c."CurrencyCode", c."DeletedBy", c."DeletedDate", c."Email", c."IsDeleted", c."LastSyncedAt", c."LicenseKey", c."LogoUrl", c."ModifiedBy", c."ModifiedDate", c."Phone", c."PurchaseCode", c."SyncVersion", c."TaxName", c."TaxNumber", c."TenantId", c."Title"
FROM "CompanyProfiles" AS c
WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted")
LIMIT 1

UserAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
CommandText:
SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName", c."Email", c."ContactPerson", c."MobileNo", c."Website", c."IsWalkIn"
FROM "Customers" AS c
WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted") AND (c."SalesPersonId" = @userId OR (c."LocationId" IS NOT NULL AND c."LocationId" = ANY (@allowedLocations)))
ORDER BY c."CustomerName"
LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p

UserAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
CommandText:
SELECT (
    SELECT p0."Name"
    FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s2
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT s4."Id", s4."LocationId", s4."SOCreatedDate"
        FROM "SalesOrders" AS s4
        WHERE s4."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s4."IsDeleted")
    ) AS s3 ON s2."SalesOrderId" = s3."Id"
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT p."Id", p."Name"
        FROM "Products" AS p
        WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted")
    ) AS p0 ON s2."ProductId" = p0."Id"
    WHERE s3."SOCreatedDate" >= @fromDate AND s3."SOCreatedDate" < @toDate AND s3."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND s."ProductId" = s2."ProductId"
    LIMIT 1) AS "Name", COALESCE(sum(CASE
    WHEN s."Status" = 1 THEN -1.0 * s."Quantity"
    ELSE s."Quantity"
END), 0.0) AS "Count"
FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s0."Id", s0."LocationId", s0."SOCreatedDate"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s0
    WHERE s0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s0."IsDeleted")
) AS s1 ON s."SalesOrderId" = s1."Id"
WHERE s1."SOCreatedDate" >= @fromDate AND s1."SOCreatedDate" < @toDate AND s1."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds)
GROUP BY s."ProductId"
ORDER BY COALESCE(sum(CASE
    WHEN s."Status" = 1 THEN -1.0 * s."Quantity"
    ELSE s."Quantity"
END), 0.0) DESC
LIMIT @p

CommandText:
SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @lastYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

CommandText:
SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @lastYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0

CommandText:
SELECT p1."Id" AS "PurchaseOrderId", p1."OrderNumber" AS "PurchaseOrderNumber", p1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedDispatchDate", s0."SupplierName", p1."SupplierId", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN p2."Status" = 0 THEN p2."Quantity"
        ELSE -p2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p2
    WHERE p1."Id" = p2."PurchaseOrderId") AS "TotalQuantity"
FROM (
    SELECT p."Id", p."DeliveryDate", p."OrderNumber", p."SupplierId"
    FROM "PurchaseOrders" AS p
    WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted") AND NOT (p."IsPurchaseOrderRequest") AND p."DeliveryStatus" = 0 AND p."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN p0."Status" = 0 THEN p0."Quantity"
            ELSE -p0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "PurchaseOrderItems" AS p0
        WHERE p."Id" = p0."PurchaseOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY p."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS p1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s."Id", s."SupplierName"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
) AS s0 ON p1."SupplierId" = s0."Id"
ORDER BY p1."DeliveryDate" DESC

CommandText:
SELECT l."Id", l."AccountName"
FROM "LedgerAccounts" AS l
WHERE l."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (l."IsDeleted")

UserAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
CommandText:
SELECT s1."Id" AS "SalesOrderId", s1."OrderNumber" AS "SalesOrderNumber", s1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedShipmentDate", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN s2."Status" = 0 THEN s2."Quantity"
        ELSE -s2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s2
    WHERE s1."Id" = s2."SalesOrderId") AS "Quantity", s1."CustomerId", c0."CustomerName"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."CustomerId", s."DeliveryDate", s."OrderNumber"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest") AND s."DeliveryStatus" = 1 AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN s0."Status" = 0 THEN s0."Quantity"
            ELSE -s0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s0
        WHERE s."Id" = s0."SalesOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY s."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName"
    FROM "Customers" AS c
    WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted")
) AS c0 ON s1."CustomerId" = c0."Id"
ORDER BY s1."DeliveryDate" DESC

UserAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
CommandText:
SELECT s1."Id", s1."ContactPerson", s1."Description", s1."Fax", s1."SupplierName", s1."Website", s1."MobileNo", s1."PhoneNo", s1."Email", s2."CountryName" AS "Country"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."BillingAddressId", s."ContactPerson", s."Description", s."Email", s."Fax", s."MobileNo", s."PhoneNo", s."SupplierName", s."Website"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
    ORDER BY s."SupplierName"
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s0."Id", s0."CountryName"
    FROM "SupplierAddresses" AS s0
    WHERE s0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s0."IsDeleted")
) AS s2 ON s1."BillingAddressId" = s2."Id"
ORDER BY s1."SupplierName"
